evaluation.summary: The RMT-corrected Chebyshev bias experiment for modulo 210 shows a massive 430x discrepancy between empirical variance and theoretical RMT prediction, indicating the theoretical model fails to capture the observed behavior at this scale.
next_directions: Validate L-function zero computations against exact values rather than logarithmic approximations
Extend to larger x (10^7-10^8) to test asymptotic convergence
Re-examine the RMT variance formula derivation for missing finite-scale corrections
